programme.title: BKFC 30: Hunt vs. Henry
programme.desc: Features Lorenzo Hunt vs. Quentin Henry, Ben Rothwell vs. Bobo O'Bannon, plus Kaleb Harris vs. Harris Stephenson in bare knuckle boxing bouts from Monroe, La. From Oct. 1, 2022.

programme.title: BKFC 42 Greenville: Soto vs. Goodjohn
programme.desc: Antonio Soto III vs. Tyler Goodjohn, lightweights; Doug Coltrane vs. Blake LaCaze, middleweights. From Bon Secours Wellness Arena in Greenville, S.C.

programme.title: Flex Fight Series
programme.desc: FFS 55: The Secret Society is live from Stereo Garden in New York.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Liz Carmouche vs. Deanna Bennett, women's flyweight championship; Tim Johnson vs. Said Sowma, heavyweight bout. From April 21, 2023, at Neal S. Blaisdell Arena in Honolulu.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Raufeon Stots vs. Patchy Mix, bantamweight World Grand Prix bout; Ilima-Lei MacFarlane vs. Kana Watanabe, women's flyweight bout. From April 22, 2023, at Neal S. Blaisdell Arena in Honolulu.

programme.title: Hitman Fight League
programme.desc: From BEC Arena in Manchester, UK.

programme.desc: Jonathan Coachman hosts this no-holds-barred daily sports talk show. "The Coach" leads dynamic discussions with a rotating cast of all-star analysts and sports insiders.

programme.desc: From Grayson Stadium in Savannah, Ga.

programme.title: Banana Ball World Tour
programme.desc: From Grayson Stadium in Savannah, Ga.

programme.title: BKFC 31: Richman vs. Doolittle
programme.desc: Features Mike Richman vs. Isaac Doolittle, Jake Lindsey vs. Brandon Girtz, plus Chris Camozzi vs. Bubba McDaniel in bare knuckle boxing action from Broomfield, Colo. From Oct. 15, 2022.

programme.title: BKFC 32
programme.desc: Features Reginald Barnett Jr. vs. Geane Herrera, Jared Warren vs. Jay Jackson, plus Bobby Taylor vs. Gabriel Freyre in bare knuckle boxing action from Orlando, Fla. From Nov. 5, 2022.

programme.title: BKFC 43
programme.desc: From Liberty First Arena in Omaha, Neb. On May 19, 2023.

programme.desc: From Dec. 13, 2024 at Melrose Ballroom in Queens, N.Y.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Gegard Mousasi vs. Fabian Edwards, middleweight bout; Brent Primus vs. Mansour Barnaoui, lightweight world grand prix bout. From Accor Arena in Paris.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Vadim Nemkov vs. Yoel Romero, light heavyweight championship bout; Sergio Pettis vs. Patricio Pitbull, bantamweight championship bout. From Wintrust Arena in Chicago.

programme.title: BKFC 33
programme.desc: Features Houston Alexander vs. Joey Beltran, Kevin Croom vs. Sean Wilson, plus Carlos Trinidad vs. Rynell Riley in bare knuckle boxing action. From Nov. 18, 2022.

programme.title: BKFC 34
programme.desc: Features Luis Palomino vs. Tom Shoaff for BKFC lightweight title, and David Mundell vs. Francesco Ricci for vacant BKFC middleweight title from Hollywood, Florida. From Dec. 3, 2022.

programme.title: BKFC 44
programme.desc: Number one-rated Kai Stewart takes on number two-rated Louie Lopez for the BKFC featherweight championship belt in Great Falls, Montana on June 9.

programme.title: BKFC 45: Palomino vs. Lilley
programme.desc: Luis Palomino vs. James Lilley, lightweight championship bout. From Seminole Hard Rock Hotel & Casino in Hollywood, Fla.

programme.title: The Bare Knuckle Show
programme.desc: Host Brian Soscia discusses combat sporting news, exclusive BKFC content, interviews & more from the past month.

programme.title: TCL Team Boxing League
programme.desc: Professional boxing with teams of male and female fighters competing in individual one round contests.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Logan Storley vs. Brennan Ward, welterweight bout; Valentin Moldavsky vs. Steve Mowry, heavyweight bout; Dalton Rosta vs. Aaron Jeffery, middleweight bout; Sidney Outlaw vs. Islam Mamedov, lightweight bout. From Aug. 11, 2023 in Sioux Falls, S.D.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Johnny Eblen vs. Fabian Edwards, middleweight championship bout; Aaron Pico vs. Pedro Carvalho, featherweights; Mads Burnell vs. Daniel Weichel, featherweights. From Sept. 23, 2023 in Dublin.

programme.title: No Gamble, No Future
programme.desc: The stand-up game kicks off the final episode of the season, and a poker legend pays the penalty to the table; Eric Hicks rides a heater of hot hands and hot plays as he continues to drag pots, while Matt Berkey plays a big one against Matt Steinberg.

programme.desc: Antonio Esfandiari, Andrew Sasson, Brandon Steven, Alex Dombroff, John Morgan and Jennifer Tilly play $100/$200 No-Limit Hold'em.

programme.desc: Burro racing is an actual sport in Colorado. Paddy connects with his hoofed partner to complete at a race.

programme.title: Failure is an Option

programme.desc: In this episode, I set out to fix a missing element for a walk in the woods' self-hiking boots.

programme.title: Failure is an Option
programme.desc: Carrying water is a hassle on long runs, so I’ve built a robot cooler that follows me on the road and trail.

programme.desc: Off the Grid delivers the fiercest line-up of adventurous skiers in the deepest snow and steepest mountains.

programme.desc: Kai Lenny competes in the Gigantes de Nazaré contest in Portugal before jetting home to Maui.

programme.title: Khanh Ong’s Wild Food
programme.desc: Chef Khanh Ong learns to cook Magpie Goose with Nywaigi local, Buddy Cassidy.

programme.title: IRONMAN 70.3 Pennsylvania Happy Valley North American Championship June 2026
programme.desc: Athletes dive into reservoir waters, pedal through country roads, and run through the heart of the PSU campus.

programme.title: Descending
programme.desc: History fanatic Scott talks Ellis into diving the shark-infested waters off the coast of the Solomon Islands.

programme.title: Huckberry Homes
programme.sub-title: Inside This Adventure Filmmaker's Gear Garage & Colorado Home
programme.desc: We head out to the Western Slope, outside Vail, Colorado, to visit our longtime friend Sinuhe Xavier.

programme.title: Huckberry Homes
programme.sub-title: Full Vintage Van Tour: Inside This Photographer's Ultimate Camper Van
programme.desc: On this episode of Huckberry Homes, we caught our good friend and photographer James Barkman out in the wild.

programme.title: Adventure Cities
programme.desc: Jonathan Thompson embarks on a journey through Derry, Ireland, uncovering the city's adventurous side.

programme.title: Adventure Cities
programme.desc: Jonathan Thompson dives into Belfast, Ireland, seeking out its most thrilling adventure travel experiences.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: Teton County SAR faces its toughest day yet: a lost hiker, a snowmobile crash, and an avalanche.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: SAR uses helicopters and controlled detonations for a rescue where calculated risks and courage are vital.
